name: Greenpanel Industries Limited
summary: Greenpanel Industries Limited engages in the manufacture and sale of wood panels in India and internationally. It provides plain and pre-laminated medium density fibre boards; wood, laminated, and veneered floors; plywood and blockboard products; veneers; and doors. The company also trades in medium density fibre boards and allied products. Greenpanel Industries Limited was incorporated in 2017 and is headquartered in Kolkata, India.
